overview: Invokes the [Enrycher Web service](http://enrycher.ijs.si/) to provide ITS disambiguation annotations in the source text content. The step sends groups of source entries to the Enrycher service, receives ITS-annotated results, and maps them back to Okapi inline annotations usable by downstream steps. For more information on the ITS Text Analysis data category, see the [ITS Version 2.0 Disambiguation specification](http://www.w3.org/TR/its20/#Disambiguation).

baseUrl.help: The URL of the Enrycher Web service endpoint to use for disambiguation annotation.

maxEvents.help: Controls how many events are buffered before sending a batch query to the Web service. Higher values send more segments at once, which generally **improves speed**, but requires **more memory**.
notes: The greater the buffer size, the more memory is consumed. Adjust based on available resources and document size.

limitations: The Enrycher Web service (as of Aug 2013) supports only **English** and **Slovenian**.
The amount of annotations added to the content can be very high depending on the type of text.
processingNotes: Events are buffered and sent in batches to the Web service rather than individually, controlled by the `maxEvents` parameter.
Results from the Enrycher service are mapped back to Okapi inline annotations compatible with other pipeline steps.
